# Models with binary predictors {binary-predictors}

```{r binary-predictors-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/binary-predictors-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/binary-predictors/"
)
```

```{r child-binary-predictors, child="../lecture-content/15-binary-predictors.Rmd"}
```
